channel.title: Android on My Awesome Site
channel.description: Recent content in Android on My Awesome Site

item.title: Android Wireless Debugging: The Most Convenient Way to Connect to Your Android Device
item.author: wildanpastioke@gmail.com (Wildan)
item.description: Connecting your Android device through a USB is pretty mainstream. I will show you that you are actually able to connect it directly through wireless connection here.

item.title: Android MTP: The Simplest Way to Connect Your Android Devices to Archlinux via USB
item.author: wildanpastioke@gmail.com (Wildan)
item.description: Are you wondering about how to connect your Android phone to Archlinux through a USB? Here, I will explain the easiest way (GUI & CLI) to do that.

item.title: Scrcpy: Open Source Tool for Mirroring Your Android Devices
item.author: wildanpastioke@gmail.com (Wildan)
item.description: Mirroring your android devices can never be this easy with open source tool: Scrcpy
